name: Triple Star Trion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>連</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のトリオン
desc: During the End Phase, if this card is in the Graveyard because it was sent there this turn as a Tribute for a successful Tribute Summon: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard.
mnst_eff: During the End Phase, if this card is in the Graveyard because it was sent there this turn as a Tribute for a successful Tribute Summon: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard.
eff: During the End Phase, if this card is in the Graveyard because it was sent there this turn as a Tribute for a successful Tribute Summon: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
